title: Vanity: La Baguette
description: A Vanity pack that adds a baguette sword
body:
# Vanity: La Baguette

A pack for [Vanity](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core) that adds a baguette sword.

When installed alongside Vanity: Core, La Baguette Design becomes available to the player in the creative inventory and through villager trading.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b49OXnDO/images/da7bb1d114799a02705c3df3a818e867ab571dd8.png)
